name: Verify composition, visibility of elements on the 1st-5th levels of nesting on the page

steps.name: Open page: https://www.brainup.site/groups on the "ru" local
Get structure of the 1st level of nesting on the page
Check if elements of the 1st level of nesting are visible
Get structure of the 1st level of nesting on the page
Get structure of the 2nd level of nesting on the page
Check if elements of the 2nd level of nesting are visible
Get structure of the 2nd level of nesting on the page
Get structure of the 3rd level of nesting on the page
Check if elements of the 3rd level of nesting are visible
Get structure of the 3rd level of nesting on the page
Get structure of the 4th level of nesting on the page
Get structure of the 5th level of nesting on the page
Check if elements of the 5th level of nesting are visible
Get structure of the 5th level of nesting on the page

labels.name: epic
labels.value: The exercises subgroup 'Family' page in the series 'Words' on the 'ru' local
